name: Rice Bran
summary: rice bran is tracked for fat_loss,inflammation,cardiovascular with conservative evidence framing. Keep claims tied to source-backed preparation and safety context.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

use clinician review for high-dose extracts or chronic use.
